series_metadata.series_description: Welding procedure specification (WPS), Brazing Procedure specification (BPS), and procedure qualification record which list welding/brazing process and all pertinent specifications on the procedure involved.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain computer data records are no longer created by this agency ; Microform: master microfilm in appropriate storage facility records are no longer created by this agency. diazo copy in operating area ; Paper: Microfilm existing records; new records be kept on hard copy and microfilmed annually. microfilm has been checked quality and completeness
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
